sn14.29:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, it is by way of elements that beings come together and unite. Those of wrong view …
wrong concentration … wrong knowledge … wrong liberation come together and unite with those of wrong liberation.
sn14.29:2.1:
2
"Those of right view …
right concentration … right knowledge … right liberation come together and unite with those of right liberation."
